name: Executive Whaling Attack Response
description: Immediate response workflow for whaling attacks targeting C-level executives and senior leadership. Prioritizes rapid containment with AI-powered analysis of the attack, immediate executive notification via direct Slack DM and phone escalation, email quarantine, and automatic creation of a critical-priority Jira incident. Includes a delay gate for executive acknowledgment before closing. Designed for maximum urgency and minimum response time.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create critical-priority incident ticket for whaling investigation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Direct notification to executive protection team and CISO

required_integrations.name: PagerDuty
required_integrations.reason: Page on-call incident commander for immediate response

data.title: Whaling Attack Alert
data.summary: Triggers on whaling, CEO fraud, or executive-targeted phishing alerts

data.title: AI Whaling Analysis
data.summary: Rapid AI assessment of whaling indicators and executive targeting

config.custom_instructions: Assess for whaling attack: CEO/CFO impersonation, board-level urgency, wire transfer or sensitive data requests, highly personalized content referencing company events or financials, sophisticated domain spoofing

data.title: Quarantine Email Immediately
data.summary: Immediate quarantine — no decision gate for whaling severity

config.message: CRITICAL: Quarantining suspected whaling email targeting {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}} from {{$.trigger.alert.sender}}

data.title: Alert Executive Protection
data.summary: Notify executive protection team and CISO via Slack

data.title: Page Incident Commander
data.summary: Page the on-call incident commander via PagerDuty

config.message: WHALING ATTACK on {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}}. Immediate response required. Email quarantined, exec protection notified.

data.title: Create Critical Incident
data.summary: Create critical-priority Jira incident for the whaling attack

config.title: CRITICAL: Whaling Attack — {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}} targeted
config.description:
WHALING ATTACK DETECTED — CRITICAL PRIORITY

Target: {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}}
Attacker: {{$.trigger.alert.sender}}
Subject: {{$.trigger.alert.subject}}
Timestamp: {{$.trigger.alert.timestamp}}

AI Analysis:
{{$.nodes.analyze-1.result.summary}}

Immediate Actions Taken:
- Email quarantined
- Executive protection team notified
- On-call incident commander paged

Required Follow-Up:
- Confirm executive did not respond to or interact with the email
- Check for related emails in the past 30 days
- Review executive's publicly available information (OSINT)
- Brief the executive on the attack
- Assess financial fraud risk

data.title: Update Alert — Escalated
data.summary: Mark alert as escalated with full action summary

config.note: Whaling attack response completed. Email quarantined, exec protection notified, IC paged, Jira ticket created.

data.title: End — Whaling Response Complete
data.summary: All immediate containment and notification actions completed

config.summary: Whaling attack contained. Email quarantined, executive protection notified, incident commander paged, investigation ticket created.
